name: modelpilot
author: Aman Sharma Dev
description: Stop comparing AI models. ModelPilot recommends the most suitable available model for your task and routes your requests automatically.

enumDescriptions: Coding Expert - software engineering, code generation and review
Reverse Engineering Expert - assembly, decompilers, ELF/PE analysis
Binary Exploitation Expert - buffer overflows, ROP chains, pwntools
Web Security Expert - XSS, SQLi, SSRF, web vulnerabilities
Malware Analysis Expert - triage, IOC extraction, behavioral analysis
Cryptography Expert - CTF crypto, cipher analysis, encoding
Linux Expert - system admin, shell scripting, internals
Writing Expert - reports, documentation, creative writing
Documentation Expert - READMEs, API docs, technical guides
Learning Expert - explanations, tutorials, concept breakdowns
modelpilot.defaultExpert.description: Default expert profile when opening a new chat.

modelpilot.streamResponses.description: Stream responses token by token as they arrive.

enumDescriptions: Default - Prompt for approval on all modifying operations (human-in-the-loop)
Bypass - Automatically approve all tool and command executions
Autopilot - Automatically approve all tool executions and run autonomously
modelpilot.approvalMode.description: Approval mode for workspace tools and terminal commands.

enumDescriptions: Default - Automatically select mode based on request commands or user intent classification
Ask - Conversational support mode (equivalent to /ask, no tool execution)
Plan - Plan formulation mode (equivalent to /plan, generates implementation plans)
Agent - Autonomous agent mode (equivalent to /agent, executes tasks using tools)
modelpilot.defaultMode.description: Default mode of operation when no slash command is explicitly entered in chat.

chatParticipants.name: modelpilot
chatParticipants.description: Smart model routing and provider aggregation.

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask Mode - conversational support, no tool executions

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Plan Mode - generate a structured step-by-step implementation plan

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Agent Mode - autonomous task execution with tools and commands

commands.description: Coding Expert - software engineering, code generation and review

commands.description: Documentation Expert - READMEs, API docs, technical guides

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export current chat history as a Markdown file in the workspace

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
